```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement synthetic monitoring for uptime verification"
---
# Synthetic Monitoring
## Task
Set up synthetic monitoring for service uptime.
## Requirements
1. Create synthetic checks for critical paths. 2. Run from multiple geographic locations.
3. Check every 1-5 minutes. 4. Alert on failures with context.
5. Track uptime percentage.
## Constraints
- Checks must be lightweight. Alert on 2+ consecutive failures. Track global uptime.
## Success Criteria
- Critical paths monitored. Multi-location checks. Uptime tracked. Failures alerted.
```
